name: Enchilada Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic in oil over medium heat until softened.
2. Add the tomato sauce and chicken broth to the pot. Stir well.
3. Stir in the chili powder, salt, cumin, oregano, and pepper. Mix until all ingredients are combined.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
